author: @danielash4177
text: i painted an inflated inner tube with sprayed the tube with nonstick for fiber glass resin not to bond to it and cloth wrapped and fiber glass resin i dipped into conductive paint and had it chrome plated had some chromium oxide laying around made a cut on both side evenly took to remove the rubber oh yes wax is a good non adhesive as well

author: @ThinkingandTinkering
text: The toroid is to stop HV creepage. This is a high voltage machine and the voltage will travel down the support without the toroid at the base of the sphere to turn it back onto the sphere
